articles.title: Insider: Patriots probably won’t make a ‘Micah Parsons-type’ trade this offseason
articles.description:
It's the latest report to suggest the Patriots won't make a big splash this offseason.

The post Insider: Patriots probably won’t make a ‘Micah Parsons-type’ trade this offseason appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots unlikely to pursue major trades this offseason, affecting team strategy.
Insider reports suggest no 'Micah Parsons-type' moves, limiting roster upgrades.
Boston fans may see a quieter offseason with fewer high-profile acquisitions.
